summaryAm: መዘጋጀት፣ መሥራት እና ጓደኛን በርኅራኄ መመልከት የሚያሳይ ታሪክ።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: የጉንዳኑ እና የአንበጣው ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The Ant and the Grasshopper story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A hardworking ant gathers seeds while a cheerful grasshopper watches.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ መዘጋጀትን እና መጫወትን በቀላሉ ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the planning and playing moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The ant stores food in a cozy home while the grasshopper sings outside.

pages.textEn: The story will end with learning and kindness.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The ant and grasshopper share a warm lesson about preparing ahead.
